stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, what airspace restriction has to be taken into account?

WEF 1604010600 DANGER AREA EPD25 DEBA ACT. LOWER LIMIT: GND UPPER LIMIT: FL100: NOTAM EP/D1225/16 >>> END OF BULLETIN <<< Danger area EPD25 is…

options.a: activated on the 16th of the month from 04:01 until 06:00 UTC.
